description: BCD arithmetic idioms found by CPU brute-force (16-op pool with DAA)

results.name: bcd_x10
results.note: low byte of BCD*10; DAA normalizes then x16

results.name: bcd_hi_digit
results.note: extract high BCD digit (shift nibble down)

not_found.name: bcd_x2
not_found.note: KNOWN: ADD A,A + DAA (2 ops). Search missed it because our DAA model lacks half-carry (H) flag tracking. ADD 0x49+0x49=0x92 sets H flag, DAA needs H to correct low nibble. Model bug, not real absence.

not_found.name: bin_to_bcd
not_found.note: needs double-dabble or divide-by-10, not brute-forceable at this depth
